rule: Each must: acknowledge previous note lightly, give clearer value offer, be shorter than first email, no backlink ask, no pressure

followups.subject: Re: Free calculator idea (debt version)
followups.body: Hi, reaching back about the calculator widget. I've built a debt snowball vs avalanche tool that would pair well with your debt payoff content — readers compare both methods with their actual numbers. Free embed, no signup. Want me to send the code?

followups.subject: Re: Free tool for your readers (updated)
followups.body: Hi Michelle, following up from last month. I now have a debt snowball vs avalanche calculator that might help your readers working through debt — side-by-side comparison with their real numbers. Free, no signup. Want me to send the one-line embed?

followups.subject: Re: Interactive calculator idea
followups.body: Hi Jeremy, checking in on the custom calculator idea — I can create an interactive version where your readers plug in their own investing numbers instead of reading static examples. No cost, no signup. Would that be useful for any of your articles?

followups.subject: Re: Mortgage calculator (corrected offer)
followups.body: Hi, reaching out again — my earlier email sent the wrong calculator. I actually have a mortgage affordability calculator that's a much better fit for your readers. Shows exact home price based on income, debts, and down payment. Free embed, no signup. Want the code?

followups.subject: Re: Mortgage affordability widget — quick check
followups.body: Hi Paula, just checking the mortgage affordability widget I shared didn't get buried. No pressure — happy to answer questions or adjust sizing. Let me know either way!

followups.subject: Re: Mortgage calculator widget — quick check
followups.body: Hi Robert, just checking if the mortgage affordability widget would be useful for your readers. Happy to answer questions. Let me know either way!

followups.subject: Re: Debt payoff widget — quick check
followups.body: Hi ESI, following up on the debt snowball vs avalanche widget — no worries if it's not a fit, just wanted to check it didn't get lost. Let me know!

followups.subject: Re: FIRE-friendly mortgage widget — quick check
followups.body: Hi Kristy, quick follow-up on the FIRE-friendly mortgage calculator widget — just checking it didn't get buried. Happy to answer questions!
